title: 135 PCS Screw Hooks 6 Sizes Vintage Bronze Cup Hooks for Mug Hanging Christmas Lights Plants Indoors Outdoors Use
features: 【Vintage Style】: Vintage bronze hooks with unique bronze color is full of vintage vibe, elegant and simple. Its assorted sizes can meet different needs and sturdy material ensures a long time service, practical and nice hooks for outdoors and indoors use! Great for organizing items to keep everything in order!

【Sturdy & Anti-Rust】: Produced with premium carbon steel material, screw hook is very sturdy, anti-rust and durable. And coated with copper, it has very smooth surface and no burr, which can protect your items you hang on well!

【Sharp End & Easy To Use】: No need to drill! - Convenient to use! Screw cup hook has very sharp end, so you can easily screw it into wood board without other tools! And Its deep thread ensures stability, keeping your items in place firmly!

【6 Sizes Screw Hooks-Meet Various Needs!】: So amazing! - There are 135 pieces and 6 assorted sizes of screw-in hooks in the package, including 15pcs 1-1/4 inch hooks, 15pcs 1 inch hooks, 20psc 7/8 inch hooks, 25pcs 3/4 inch hooks, 25pcs 5/8 inch hooks and 30pcs 1/2 inch hooks, 135pcs in total. Different sizes and enough quantities can meet your various needs, so convenient! And come with a transparent box for easily storing and sorting.

【Wide Applications】: Vintage screw hooks can be widely used in home, garden, cafes, restaurants, bars, florists, shops, etc. You can screw it into wood board for hanging cup, kitchenware, keys, Christmas lights, curtains, mugs, feeders, planters , birdcages, clothes and so on. They are good helpers to keep everything in order!
